round_name: Execution/Slippage/Liquidity/Sizing/強風控 (Execution Sizing & Taiwan Market Constraints)
features_enhanced: TaiwanMarketRule enum with all 11 Taiwan constraint types
TaiwanMarketConstraints dataclass enforcing price_step, circuit_breaker, position_cap, day_trade_limit, suspended, disposition_stock, collection_auction, T+2, near_limit_up, near_limit_down, odd_lot
ExecutionSizingGuard.calculate() accepts optional TaiwanMarketConstraints with price parameter
R047 coverage rework: all declared Taiwan constraint rules now enforced and tested

coverage_rework.previous_gap: TaiwanMarketRule.PRICE_STEP declared but not enforced; Taiwan constraints T+2/auction/odd-lot/near-limit/suspended/disposition only in pre-existing checklist.py, not in R047
rework_fixes: PRICE_STEP now enforced in TaiwanMarketConstraints.check() with price parameter validation
Added t_plus_2_blocked, collection_auction, is_odd_lot, near_limit_up, near_limit_down, is_suspended, is_disposition_stock fields to TaiwanMarketConstraints
All 11 Taiwan constraint types enforced in check(), each blocking (no-trade) when violated
Added 12 new tests covering all Taiwan constraint types and integration paths
price_step validated against price quantization: round(price / price_step) * price_step == price
Priority order enforced: circuit_breaker > suspended > disposition > auction > T+2 > near_limit > odd_lot > position_cap > day_trade_limit
